heightfield_candidate.source_crs: USGS ImageServer export sample; final section working CRS and Unreal transform still require review

target_unreal.intended_import_target: Unreal Landscape import-test level or replacement terrain layer
target_unreal.reason_disabled: Heightfield is a sample export, not a complete tiled, clipped, conditioned, channel-burned, guide-reviewed South Fork terrain.

required_before_enable: Replace the sample export with reviewed full-corridor DEM/lidar tiles or explicitly approve a proxy import-test scope.
Record source CRS, working CRS, vertical datum handling, and WGS84/local/Unreal transforms.
Clip and condition the DEM to the reviewed South Fork corridor and river centerline.
Burn or otherwise encode the reviewed channel, banks, shelves, boulder beds, and access edges.
Compare against existing South Fork solver corridor geometry and accepted water validation artifacts.
Run editor import/export validation and refreshed guide-seat/river-eye captures before replacing procedural terrain.
notes: This contract gives the South Fork heightfield candidate a traceable Unreal-side target and gate.
It must not be treated as production terrain or solver geometry until the conditioning gates pass.
